sections.paragraph:
ἄθικτος, ον inviolable, sacred (so Trag. et al.; SIG 569, 16; Sb 7202, 68 [III b.c.]; BGU 1773, 13 [I b.c.]; Sym. Lev 8:9; 21:12; JosAs 14:13 [στολή ‘untouched’, ‘pure’, with the connotation ‘never before worn’]) τὰ ἄ. ἀρχεῖα IPhld 8:2.—DELG s.v. θιγγάνω.

Trag.

Trag. = writer (s) of tragedy

trag. = tragedy, writer (s) of tragedy

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 24
